# SNOWORKSX

> Purpose-built OEM manufacturer of snowboards, skis, ski boots, snowboard boots, bindings and poles. Based in Weihai, Shandong, China. Established 2012. $75M USD production facility. 600+ employees. 400,000+ units exported annually to 13 elite global winter sports brands.

SNOWORKSX is an original equipment manufacturer (OEM) — we manufacture winter sports hardware under our clients' own brand names. We do not sell a consumer-facing brand of our own.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2012, Weihai, Shandong Province, China
- Facility: 100,000 m² site, 68,000 m² dedicated production floor
- Capacity: 2,500 units/day peak, 400,000+ units/year exported
- Employees: 600+
- Product categories: Snowboards, Skis, Ski Boots, Snowboard Boots, Bindings, Poles
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, AEO (Authorized Economic Operator)
- Olympic history: Equipment from this facility supported 86 athletes at Sochi 2014 (7 Gold, 8 Silver, 6 Bronze). Official equipment supplier for Beijing 2022 national teams.
- Export markets: North America, Europe, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Middle East
- Minimum order quantity: starts at 20 units depending on product category
- Standard lead time: 40–65 days from purchase order to completion, depending on product

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://snoworksx.com/): Company overview, manufacturing capabilities, certifications
- [Products](https://snoworksx.com/products): Full OEM product range across six categories
- [Manufacturing Process](https://snoworksx.com/process): 7-step production process, QC system, seasonal order calendar
- [Technology](https://snoworksx.com/technology): Core materials, construction methods, base grades, boot/binding technology
- [About](https://snoworksx.com/about): Company history, factory capability, sustainability and ESG documentation
- [Blog](https://snoworksx.com/blog): Industry guides on OEM sourcing, sustainability compliance, production planning
- [Contact](https://snoworksx.com/contact): Request a manufacturing quote

## Contact

- Email: info@snoworksx.com
- Location: Weihai, Shandong, China
